title: Deliver the CCP Core v0.1 portable baseline
problem_statement: CCP needs one portable, implementation-neutral v0.1 baseline that other teams can read, validate, and run locally without depending on Foundry or any hosted control plane.
desired_end_state: This repo publishes the v0.1 normative spec, schemas, examples, fixtures, templates, and thin reference CLI, and it dogfoods that baseline through a linked control-plane chain for the repo itself.
acceptance_criteria: The repo publishes the CCP v0.1 normative spec plus supporting consultation, architecture, and boundary documents for the portable core
Schemas, examples, fixtures, templates, and the reference CLI all exercise the frozen v0.1 object model and pass repo regression checks
The repo dogfoods CCP with a linked control-plane chain for the v0.1 baseline, with evidence recorded against that same change
non_goals: Turn the core repo into the Foundry product
Require hosted workflow infrastructure or product-specific review behavior
constraints: Keep the portable baseline local-first and implementation-neutral
Do not make Foundry-specific UX, approvals, or orchestration semantics normative
